tasks.label: Build and Test
args:
& { $programFilesX86 = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('ProgramFilesX86'); $vswhere = $null; if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($programFilesX86)) { $vswhere = Join-Path $programFilesX86 'Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe' }; $msbuild = $null; if ($vswhere -and (Test-Path $vswhere)) { $msbuild = & $vswhere -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1 }; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($msbuild)) { $msbuildCommand = Get-Command msbuild.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($null -ne $msbuildCommand) { $msbuild = $msbuildCommand.Source } }; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($msbuild)) { Write-Error 'MSBuild.exe could not be resolved. Install Visual Studio Build Tools or ensure MSBuild is on PATH.'; exit 1 }; & $msbuild 'ClickIt.sln' '/p:Configuration=Debug' '/p:IncludeIntegrationTests=true' '/p:exapiPackage=..\..\PoeHelper
et48'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & dotnet test 'Tests\ClickIt.Tests.csproj' -c Debug -p:IncludeIntegrationTests=true; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $src = Join-Path $pwd 'bin\Debug
et10.0-windows\win-x64\ClickIt.dll'; if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { Write-Error "Compiled DLL not found at $src"; exit 1 }; $dest = 'C:\Path\To\PoeHelper
et48\Plugins\Compiled\ClickIt'; if (-not (Test-Path $dest)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dest -Force; Write-Output "Copied $src to $dest" }

tasks.label: Review Coverage
args: & { & dotnet test 'Tests\ClickIt.Tests.csproj' --collect 'XPlat Code Coverage' --settings 'runsettings.xml' -c Debug '/p:CollectCoverage=false' '/p:IncludeIntegrationTests=true' '/p:BuildProjectReferences=false'; $testExitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; $latestCoverage = Get-ChildItem -Path '.' -Recurse -Filter 'coverage.cobertura.xml' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $latestCoverage) { if ($testExitCode -ne 0) { Write-Warning 'No coverage.cobertura.xml file was found after the failing test run.'; exit $testExitCode }; Write-Error 'No coverage.cobertura.xml file was produced.'; exit 1 }; $destFile = 'Tests\TestResults\coverage.cobertura.xml'; $destDir = Split-Path $destFile -Parent; if (-not (Test-Path $destDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destDir -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item $latestCoverage.FullName $destFile -Force; if ((Test-Path $latestCoverage.Directory.FullName) -and $latestCoverage.Directory.Name -match '^[0-9a-f-]+$') { Remove-Item $latestCoverage.Directory.FullName -Recurse -Force }; & reportgenerator '-reports:${workspaceFolder}/Tests/TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml' '-targetdir:${workspaceFolder}/Tests/TestResults/covstats-xplat'; $reportExitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($reportExitCode -ne 0) { exit $reportExitCode }; exit $testExitCode }
